channel.title: barefoot___wanderer
channel.description: DIY ЁЯкЪ Building my own container house тЪТя╕П Owner Builder Learning as I go ЁЯТк

item.title: ItтАЩs been 6 weeks now sinceтАж I decided to do my own house fo...
item.description:
ItтАЩs been 6 weeks now sinceтАж I decided to do my own house foundations ЁЯПа As an owner builder the only jobs I am not allowed to do are the plumbing and electrical, however the foundations for my house is a job I had originally wanted to contract out due to its importance. тЪТя╕П However with my budget only being 100k for my entire house build and getting quotes back all around the 60k mark for the house foundations alone there was just no other way than to do it myself. ЁЯд╖тАНтЩАя╕П But wow itтАЩs been a massive surprise to me how much is involved in the process, in my mind digging holes would be one of the simplest parts of the whole job however it has turned out to be the hardest and most time consuming тМЫя╕П This is because my soil type is rock hard clay so even a digger struggled with the job, it wasnтАЩt until I found a cheap jack hammer on marketplace that the game changed and digging the holes became more тАШdo-ableтАЩ ЁЯЪЬ The majority of the six weeks that IтАЩve been working on the foundations has been dedicated to digging and that leads into my question. ЁЯЩЛ WhatтАЩs your opinion? тмЗя╕П Do you think itтАЩs worth saving 9/10 of the quoted cost to complete my foundations, even though itтАЩs taking 2-3x the amount of time? ЁЯд╖тАНтЩАя╕П
#homebuildbudget #ownerbuilder #containerhome #housefoundations #solobuild #diy
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: ЁЯЫая╕ПЁЯПаHow I started my container home build journey ЁЯПаЁЯЫ...
item.description:
ЁЯЫая╕ПЁЯПаHow I started my container home build journey ЁЯПаЁЯЫая╕П The vision wasnтАЩt always clear, but my dream evolved with the changing circumstances and not once have I ever doubted my ability to get it done.ЁЯТк Life is full of challenges and obstacles, if you have the tools to get through them, those former challenges transform into our wins and successes, the building blocks that make up who we are. ЁЯзН I believe one of the main factors of how we live our life is perception, we donтАЩt see reality as it is, we see it as we are ЁЯСА This is your life, your reality and the key word here is тАШyouтАЩ! It all comes down to you, how do you want to perceive your reality? тЬиЁЯл╢
#mystory #containerhome #buildjourney #ownerbuilder #shippingcontainer #shippingcontainerhome #buildingadream
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: AND THATS A BLOODY WRAP FOR 2025! Honestly what a bloody year, ...
item.description:
AND THATS A BLOODY WRAP FOR 2025! Honestly what a bloody year, yes I did expect to be finished by now but IтАЩve also come to realise my time perception is shot ЁЯдФ And when I look back on 2025 I was able to complete some pretty big ticket items on a small budget for example even though the window restoration took forever I saved over 70k not buying new! The millingтАж well actually the whole timber process has felt so long but when I only spent $3k on the timber mill and the timber I milled that was free from my property has a value of $150k-$350k so the argument тАШwhat is your time worth?тАЩ canтАЩt even be made because IтАЩd take a wage like that any day! ЁЯШН Not to mention of course the 160sqm deck I installed into rock hard clay soil in the peak of summer or the amount of cutting steel I did to take down all the walls and install the window and door cut outs or the welding to weld them all in and the containers together. I canтАЩt forget my DIY fabricated upward opening bedroom doorтАж okay now I think about it were all my jobs big ticket items? ЁЯдФЁЯШВ The point is I can say with full confidence I succeeded in my goal of working my butt off until I dropped every night, I only had a small handful of days off for the entire year and I didnтАЩt miss a single week of turning my weekly build efforts into content so I could share it with you! ЁЯе░ I just want to say if youтАЩve been following the build from the start or if youтАЩve just arrived thank you for being here, thanks for showing up every week with support and thanks for turning this solo build into what feels like a team build! I couldnтАЩt do it without you! ЁЯе╣ I hope you have the most incredible holiday season to end off your 2025 and I canтАЩt wait to welcome you back to my homestead in 2026 so we can wrap up this build as a team! ЁЯТк All my love x
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: Do you think my 100k AUD budget is possible? ЁЯдФ IтАЩve been bl...
item.description:
Do you think my 100k AUD budget is possible? ЁЯдФ IтАЩve been blown away with the costs that have been presented to me when building a house and IтАЩve managed to cut them in every area of the build so farтАж BUT in Australia owner builders arenтАЩt allowed to do the plumbing or electrical so this means I do have to contract these two jobs out! My fingers are crossed they donтАЩt cost too much and IтАЩm able to pull off this budget build and end with my dream home ЁЯдЮЁЯе░
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: You canтАЩt tell me my containers donтАЩt look close to new now ...
item.description:
You canтАЩt tell me my containers donтАЩt look close to new now ЁЯШЙ Okay so it wasnтАЩt as big of a job as I anticipated but it was for sure a sucky one! Is my relationship with rust over yet?? ЁЯЩД

item.title: тАЬI thought I would just cut a square and take it outтАЭ ЁЯЩДЁЯ...
item.description:
тАЬI thought I would just cut a square and take it outтАЭ ЁЯЩДЁЯШВ Even after 17 months of building this house I still approach every new part of the build with a тАШthis shouldnтАЩt be too hardтАЩ attitude When in reality I should know by now it probably will be ЁЯШВЁЯджтАНтЩАя╕П
